name: Cream of Artichoke Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Steam the artichokes in the 2 cups of water until tender (about 45 minutes). Reserve the liquid.
2. Allow the artichokes to cool, then scrape the flesh from the bottom third of each leaf.
3. Add the scraped artichoke flesh and reserved liquid to a medium soup pot.
4. Remove the fuzzy choke from each artichoke bottom and discard them.
5. Coarsely dice the artichoke bottoms and add them to the soup pot.
6. Add the remaining ingredients (except cream, cheese, and croutons) to the pot.
7. Simmer until the vegetables are very tender and the liquid is reduced by 1/3, about 45 minutes.
8. Puree the soup in a blender and return it to the pot.
9. Stir in the cream and cheese, then heat through without boiling.
10. Serve with croutons on top.
